email.incomingsupport.body1.text: He kiritaki kua tono i ēnei mōhiohio

email.secret_link.subject.text: Kua tono %{sender_email} i tētahi karere huna ki a koe

email.secret_link.sent_you_secret.text: kua tono i tētahi karere huna ki a koe:

email.secret_link.link_works_once.text: Ka mahi kotahi-wā anō tēnei hononga. I muri i te tirohia, ka mukua mō ake tonu te karere huna.

email.welcome.subject.text: Nau mai ki %{product_name} - Tēnā manatokohia tō īmēra

email.welcome.verify_prompt.text: Tēnā manatokohia tō wāhitau īmēra mā te pāwhiri i te hononga i raro nei:

email.welcome.copy_link_prompt.text: Tāruatia, ā, mototia tēnei hononga rānei:

email.welcome.postscript.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{email_address}. Ki te kore nāu i waihanga he pūkete, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei karere.

email.password_request.request_notice.text: I tīkina tētahi tono ki te tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa mō %{product_name}.

email.password_request.copy_link_prompt.text: Tāruatia, ā, mototia tēnei hononga rānei:

email.password_request.ignore_notice.text: Ki te kore nāu i tono i te tautuhi anō kupuhipa, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei īmēra.

email.password_request.postscript.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{email_address}.

email.magic_link.request_notice.text: I tonoa e koe tētahi hononga takiuru mō tō pūkete %{product_name}.

email.magic_link.copy_link_prompt.text: Tāruatia, ā, mototia tēnei hononga rānei:

email.magic_link.expiration_notice.text: Ka pau tēnei hononga i roto i 15 meneti.

email.magic_link.ignore_notice.text: Ki te kore nāu i tono tēnei hononga, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei īmēra.

email.magic_link.postscript.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{email_address}.

email.incoming_secret.subject.text: Kua riro he karere huna māu

email.incoming_secret.received_message.text: Kua riro he karere haumaru māu:

email.incoming_secret.someone_sent.text: He tangata kua tono i tētahi karere haumaru ki a koe mā %{display_domain}.

email.incoming_secret.view_instructions.text: Hei titiro ki tēnei karere huna, pāwhiria te hononga i raro nei:

email.incoming_secret.link_works_once.text: Ka mahi kotahi-wā anō tēnei hononga. I muri i te tirohia, ka mukua mō ake tonu te karere huna.

email.incoming_secret.passphrase_require.text: Kua tiakina tēnei karere huna mā tētahi kupu karapa. Me tuku tēnā ki a koe ā tōna ake wāhi e te kaihanga.

email.secret_revealed.viewed_on.text: I tirohia tō karere huna i %{date}.

email.secret_revealed.automated_notice.text: He pānui aunoa tēnei. Kāore he mahi e hiahiatia ana.

email.secret_revealed.manage_preferences.text: Hei whakahaere i ōu hiahia pānuitanga:

email.expiration_warning.subject.text: Ka pau ā tōna wā tō hononga karere huna

email.expiration_warning.expires_in.text: Ka pau tō hononga karere huna i roto i %{time_remaining}

email.expiration_warning.view_button.text: Tirohia tō karere huna i mua i tōna paunga

email.expiration_warning.after_expiratio.text: I muri i te paunga, ka mukua mō ake tonu te karere huna, ā, kāore e taea te whakahoki mai.

email.expiration_warning.view_before_gon.text: Tirohia i mua i tōna ngaro:

email.expiration_warning.after_expiratio.text: I muri i te paunga, ka mukua mō ake tonu te karere huna.

email.organization_invitation.subject.text: Kua pōwhiritia koe ki te hono ki %{organization_name}

email.organization_invitation.title.text: Kua pōwhiritia koe ki te hono ki %{organization_name}!

email.organization_invitation.body.text: Kua pōwhiri %{inviter_email} ki a koe ki te hono ki "%{organization_name}" hei %{role_description}.

email.organization_invitation.link_instr.text: Tāruatia, ā, mototia tēnei hononga rānei:

email.organization_invitation.expiry_not.text: Ka pau tēnei pōwhiri i roto i %{days} rā.

email.organization_invitation.decline_in.text: Ki te kore e hiahia ana koe ki te hono, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei īmēra, te whakakore rānei i te pōwhiri.

email.organization_invitation.postscript.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{invited_email}. Ki te kore i tūmanakohia tēnei pōwhiri, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei karere.

email.password_changed.body.text: Kua hurihia tō kupuhipa mō %{product_name} i %{date} i %{time}.

email.password_changed.security_notice.text: Ki te kore nāu i huri tēnei, tēnā haumaru tūturu tō pūkete mā te tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa me te whakapā ki te tautoko.

email.email_changed.body.text: Kua hurihia te wāhitau īmēra o tō pūkete %{product_name} ki %{new_email_masked}.

email.email_changed.security_notice.text: Ki te kore nāu i huri tēnei, tēnā whakapā tūturu ki te tautoko nā te mea ka taea te mōrearea tō pūkete.

email.email_changed.change_notice.text: Kua hurihia te wāhitau īmēra o tō pūkete %{product_name}.

email.email_changed.if_you_initiated.text: Ki nāu i huri tēnei, kāore he mahi anō e hiahiatia ana.

email.email_changed.not_you_notice.text: Ki te kore nāu i huri tēnei, ka taea te mōrearea tō pūkete.

email.email_changed.postscript.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{email_address} hei pānui i a koe mō tētahi hurihanga wāhitau īmēra.

email.email_change_requested.change_noti.text: I tonoa te hurihanga o te wāhitau īmēra o tō pūkete %{product_name}.

email.email_change_requested.if_you_init.text: Ki nāu i tono tēnei, tirohia tō īmēra hōu mō tētahi hononga whakaū. Kāore anō i hurihia.

email.email_change_requested.not_you_not.text: Ki te kore nāu i tono tēnei, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei īmēra. Kāore i hurihia tō pūkete.

email.email_change_requested.postscript.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{email_address} nā te mea i tonoa tētahi hurihanga īmēra mō tō pūkete.

email.email_change_confirmation.body.text: Manatokohia tēnei wāhitau īmēra hei whakaoti i te hurihanga mō tō pūkete %{product_name}.

email.email_change_confirmation.request_.text: I tonoa te hurihanga o te wāhitau īmēra o tō pūkete %{product_name} ki %{new_email}.

email.email_change_confirmation.copy_lin.text: Tāruatia, ā, mototia ēnei tūhono rānei:

email.email_change_confirmation.expires_.text: Ka pau tēnei hononga i roto i %{hours} hāora.

email.email_change_confirmation.ignore_n.text: Ki te kore koe i tono i tēnei hurihanga, ka taea e koe te kore aro ki tēnei īmēra. Kāore e hurihia tō wāhitau īmēra.

email.email_change_confirmation.postscri.text: P.S. I tukuna tēnei īmēra ki %{email_address} hei whakaū i te hurihanga wāhitau īmēra.

email.mfa_enabled.body.text: Kua whakahohea te manatoko rua-ahurea mō tō pūkete %{product_name} i %{date}.

email.mfa_enabled.security_notice.text: He haumaru ake ināianei tō pūkete. Me tāuru koe i tētahi waehere manatoko mai i tō tono manatoko ina takiuru ana.

email.mfa_disabled.body.text: Kua monokia te manatoko rua-ahurea mō tō pūkete %{product_name} i %{date}.

email.mfa_disabled.warning_notice.text: He iti ake ināianei te haumaru o tō pūkete. Ki te kore nāu i huri tēnei, tēnā haumaru tūturu tō pūkete.

email.new_login_alert.subject.text: He takiuru hōu ki tō pūkete (%{display_domain})

email.new_login_alert.body.text: I kitea tētahi takiuru hōu ki tō pūkete %{product_name} i %{date} i %{time}.

email.new_login_alert.not_you_notice.text: Ki te kore nāu tēnā, ka taea te mōrearea tō pūkete.

email.member_removed.body.text: Kua tangohia koe i te rōpū "%{organization_name}" i runga %{product_name}.

email.role_changed.subject.text: Kua hurihia tō tūnga i roto i %{organization_name}

email.role_changed.body.text: Kua hurihia tō tūnga i roto i "%{organization_name}" mai i %{old_role} ki %{new_role}.

email.organization_deleted.body.text: Kua mukua te rōpū "%{organization_name}" i %{product_name}. Kua tangohia ngā raraunga katoa e hono ana.

email.payment_receipt.body.text: Ngā mihi mō tō utu. Ko ēnei ngā taipitopito o tō utu:

email.payment_failed.body.text: Kāore i taea e mātou te mahi i tō utu mō %{product_name}. Tēnā whakahōu tō ara utu hei ārai i te whakakore ratonga.

email.trial_expiring.subject.text: Ka pau tō whakamātauranga %{product_name} i roto i %{days_remaining} rā

email.trial_expiring.title.text: Ka Mutu Ā Tōna Wā Tō Whakamātauranga

email.trial_expiring.body.text: Ka pau tō whakamātauranga kore-utu o %{product_name} i roto i %{days_remaining} rā. Whakahounga ināianei hei tiaki i tō urunga ki ngā āhuatanga katoa.

email.subscription_changed.body.text: Kua hurihia tō ohaurunga %{product_name} mai i %{old_plan} ki %{new_plan}.

email.common.view_in_browser.text: Titiro i roto i te pūtirotiro
